content: is there really no irc channel for this project?
zulip can have a irc bot I think, but we haven't set it up, the zulip client has the feature to render markdowns, and it's very useful for code sharing.
I can run an IRC channel if you like because I use it a lot
I think it is best to avoid splitting people between two chat systems at this point.
Well, the idea is not splitting. But if there was a IRC bridge I'd definitely use it.
i was trying to set up irc bridge this morning, but found that I was not able to create a personal bot here.
What kind of permissions do you need to set it up? Is it the one at https://zulip.com/integrations/doc/irc or something else?
Yeah - that's the one. "Create a bot" just wasn't an option.
I think you should be able to create it now.

Thank you for enabling that. Sadly, I next ran into https://github.com/zulip/python-zulip-api/issues/772 . It's probably some pretty simple py wrangling so I'll aim to find some time to do that, but not now.
